React renders all labels, counts, icons, levels, gems, buttons, and gameplay affordances. Gem panel must be a straight, front-facing, calibratable 5x5 grid of empty wells. Preserve the successful style identity from the original set, but fix the marked slot according to the human instruction. Do not include text, numbers, Chinese, English, Roman numerals, logos, watermarks, fake readable glyphs, UI labels, counters, cards, buttons, hover rings, selection states, screenshots, contact-sheet layouts, or app chrome. React renders all labels, counts, icons, levels, gems, buttons, cards, hover rings, selection states, and gameplay affordances. Return a single clean game asset image only.
